name: ICurve
summary: Interface that represents an abstract curved geometry defined by a set of points. This interface is intended to be the base class of 3D curves.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Returns a deep copy of the geometry

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: Gets the end point of the curve. May be the same as StartPoint if the curve is closed.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: Gets the length of the curve

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: Gets the start point of the curve
